collapsible={false} name={"newAreas"} required={false} schemaName={"string[]"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"status"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`success`, `delayed`]"} schema={{"enum":["success","delayed"],"type":"string"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"updatedCount"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined}
